title: Awarded the MDPI 2024 Top 1000 Reviewers
description: The MDPI 2024 Top 1000 Reviewers certificate honors exceptional dedication and expertise in academic peer review, presented with sincere gratitude for invaluable contributions that uphold the quality and integrity of scholarly publishing.

title: AI & Sustainability Books Indexed in Scopus
description: Two edited volumes—Artificial Intelligence and Data Science for Sustainability and Achieving Sustainability in Multi-Industry Settings With AI—are now indexed in Scopus, increasing their global visibility and accessibility.

title: Visiting Research Published in Top 0.8% SSCI Journal
description: A joint study with Universitas Tidar, Indonesia, was published in Sustainable Development, a top 0.8% SSCI journal, following collaboration through the 2023 Visiting Researcher Program.

title: Panel Speaker at World Scientific Forum of Indonesia (WSFI) 2023
description: Invited as a panel speaker on digital technology at WSFI 2023, sharing ongoing research projects and engaging with the global community in Bali.

title: Ahyun & Sujin Win 3rd Place Award
description: Congratulations to Ahyun and Sujin for securing 3rd place at the Intelligent Mechanism × Artificial Intelligence Joint Academic Festival.

title: Featured in Oracle Academy Success Story
description: Our use of the Oracle Academy Cloud Program in teaching big data has been highlighted in an official online success story.

title: Metaverse Business Innovation Book Released
description: A new book on metaverse-driven business models explores emerging trends, challenges, and best practices for implementation.
